DG Dolce & Gabbana reversible down vest features a classic sleeveless design with a front metal button and collar for a simple yet refined look. Made with high-quality down filling for maximum warmth, it is perfect for layering in the fall and winter. DG Dolce & Gabbana classic logo embroidered green and white striped bordered wool cardigan seamlessly blends Italian elegance with color contrast and embroidery aesthetics. Made from high-quality 100% wool, it offers a delicate and soft skin-friendly touch, providing just the right amount of structure and warmth. Lightweight and comfortable to wear, it can be worn alone in slightly cool weather or layered for added style. The discreetly embroidered brand logo on the chest adds a touch of sophistication, while the green and white floral decorations on the collar and cuffs break the monotony of solid colors with a bold and vibrant Italian design. The well-crafted details elevate this basic piece, giving it a refined and elegant charm. The tailored fit is flattering yet relaxed, suitable for both casual and semi-formal occasions. Pair it effortlessly with a simple white T-shirt for a laid-back weekend look, or layer it under a suit for a sophisticated business casual style. The color contrast and embroidery craftsmanship embody DG's signature balance of elegance and trendiness. Sizes available: S-XXL.
